headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -74.0)
key_insights: Fears trending up 62% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 133 quotes including 107 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 59.9 sits in the middle of its historical range, though it dropped significantly from yesterday's peak of 100.0.

• Fears plunged from positive territory yesterday to -8.4 today, while optimism remained deeply negative despite a small recovery.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
